tools.name: bioresearch_run
tools.description: Execute a biomedical research workflow (literature review, biomarker discovery, or causal inference) and return structured outputs (report path, tables, figures).

workflow.description: Type of research workflow to execute.

query.description: Research query for literature review workflow.

disease.description: Disease name for biomarker discovery workflow.

exposure.description: Exposure trait for causal inference workflow.

outcome.description: Outcome trait for causal inference workflow.

notes.explicit_subtools: The runtime entry (entry.py) also exposes literature_review(query), biomarker_discovery(disease), causal_inference(exposure, outcome) as separate functions for agent chaining / prompt control.
notes.determinism: In mock mode (default) outputs are deterministic for a fixed seed (causal default seed=42). No network or API key required.
notes.model_agnostic: This schema is plain JSON-Schema and is consumable by Claude tool use, OpenAI function calling, and LangChain without modification.
